name: Chile Seared Cervena Venison with (See Full Title Below)
recipeInstructions:
----------------------------ASPARAGUS GUACAMOLE----------------------------
1/2 c Yellow onions (minced)
2 Avocados (small diced)
7 oz Asparagus (blanched, sliced into 1/8-inch thick pieces)
1 tbsp Cilantro (chopped)
1 tsp Lime juice
1 tsp Salt
------------------------------SMASHED POTATOES------------------------------
1 lb Russet potatoes (peeled and cut into cubes)
1 c Poblano chiles (roasted and peeled, small diced)
7 oz Cream cheese
3/4 c Heavy cream
1/2 tsp Black pepper
BARBECUED ROMA TOMATO SALSA:
10 Roma tomatoes
1 oz Vegetable oil
1 c Yellow onions (grilled and medium diced)
1 tbsp Garlic (minced)
1 tbsp Smoked ancho chile powder
3/4 c Tomato juice
1/4 c Champagne vinegar or red wine vinegar
1/4 c Granulated sugar (or honey or molasses)
1/2 bn Cilantro (chopped)
Chef's Notes: Chef Boy Hidy Hot XXX Habanero Sauce can be ordered from Hidy Farms, 1-770-949-7760.
